use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated aurora background effect for modern SaaS products
Main entry point for portfolio or creative agency websites seeking ethereal visual impact
Product landing page header with dynamic gradient blob animations
Dark-mode compatible hero section with ambient motion for tech-focused applications
Full-viewport hero wrapper component for flexible content placement
ai_summary: Aurora-animated hero component featuring floating, blurred gradient blobs that continuously scale and translate to create a dreamy aurora effect. Uses CSS keyframe animations for ambient motion with dark mode opacity adjustments. Renders children in a centered, full-viewport layout ideal for landing pages and product showcases. Built with Framer Motion, Shadcn utilities, and responsive Tailwind classes.
